ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "case_name" TEXT /* Name of the legal case */,
  "case_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the case number */,
  "defendant_count" INTEGER /* Number of defendants involved in the case */,
  "victim_count" INTEGER /* Number of victims involved in the case */,
  "case_type" INTEGER /* Type of case (e.g., Labor, Trafficking) */,
  "case_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the case details */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the case is being handled */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the case (e.g., open, closed, under investigation) */,
  "date_filed" TEXT /* Date when the case was filed */,
  "date_closed" TEXT /* Date when the case was closed */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department handling the case */,
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary investigator */,
  "prosecutor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary prosecutor */,
  "court" TEXT /* Name of the court where the case is being heard */,
  "hearing_date" TEXT /* Date of the next hearing */,
  "trial_date" TEXT /* Date of the trial */,
  "verdict" TEXT /* Outcome of the case (e.g., guilty, not guilty) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_case_type FOREIGN KEY ("case_type") REFERENCES case_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defendants" (
  "defendant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each defendant */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the defendant is involved in */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the defendant */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the defendant */,
  "charges" TEXT /* Charges against the defendant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the defendant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the defendant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the defendant */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the defendant */,
  "defense_attorney_id" INTEGER /* ID of the defense attorney */,
  "arrest_date" TEXT /* Date of arrest */,
  "detention_status" TEXT /* Status of detention (e.g., in custody, released) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("defendant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defendants_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defendants_defense_attorney_id FOREIGN KEY ("defense_attorney_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "victims" (
  "victim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each victim */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the victim is involved in */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the victim */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the victim */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the victim (e.g., rescued, in recovery) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the victim */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the victim */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the victim */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the victim */,
  "support_services" TEXT /* Services provided to the victim (e.g., counseling, housing) */,
  "rescue_date" TEXT /* Date of rescue */,
  "recovery_center" TEXT /* Name of the recovery center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("victim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_victims_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case file */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the file belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., PDF, Document) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the case file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_files_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_files_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case note */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the note belongs to */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., progress, update, decision) */,
  "note_status" TEXT /* Status of the note (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_notes_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_notes_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investigator, prosecutor, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the case */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the case was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_access_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "case_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first case in the relationship */,
  "case_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second case in the relationship */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship between the cases (e.g., related, merged) */,
  "relationship_description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship between the cases */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_relationships_case_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("case_id1") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_relationships_case_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("case_id2") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the case type (e.g., Labor, Trafficking) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the case type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the case type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)
